correct_answer: Compounds with the same molecular formula but different structural formulae.
incorrect_answers: Compounds with the same structural formula but different molecular formulae.
Compounds with the same functional group but different molar masses.
Atoms of the same element with different numbers of neutrons.
Compounds with different molecular formulas but similar chemical properties.
Compounds that contain the same number of carbon atoms only.

incorrect_answers: The joining of small molecules to form a polymer.
